node.html: An innovative assistive technology designed for individuals with mobility challenges. This project integrates voice recognition and hand gesture control to enable seamless navigation. It features real-time obstacle detection and emergency alerts to ensure user safety and independence.

A digital preservation project dedicated to documenting the local history, oral traditions, and cultural heritage of Chilahati, Nilphamari. It serves as a centralized hub for historical archives, ancestral narratives, and community records.
